title: 6 Pack Serving Tongs Kitchen Tongs, Buffet Tongs, Stainless Steel Food Tong Serving Tong, Small Tongs (6, Silver, 7inch)
features: Package Contents: 6-piece set of 7-inch serving tongs in silver.
Durable Construction: Crafted from premium stainless steel, this set of serving utensils features a solid structure, offering resistance to rust and supporting extended use.

Versatile Applications: These serving tongs are suitable for flipping burgers or fish, grilling meat, and serving as salad tongs. They perform well in various settings such as buffets, catering events, weddings, homes, parties, restaurants, hotels, and celebrations. Ideal for serving salads, fruit, soups, desserts, steak, noodles, cake, cheese, vegetables, and appetizers.
Easy Care & Storage: Dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning. The simple appearance allows for easy storage, and the mirror-polished surface helps maintain a bright look.
